name_cn:
【Old Pink Tiger ❤ Medium】
Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag
Inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a flagship product reflecting Dior's aesthetic. It holds various daily essentials and features a new interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery, offering a more fashionable look. The front is adorned with a "Christian Dior" logo, fully demonstrating Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.: 1286
Size: 36×28 cm
